items.q: What particle determines an element's atomic number?
items.explanation: Atomic number equals the number of protons.

items.q: What is the approximate molar mass of CO2 (g/mol)?
items.explanation: Add atomic masses multiplied by each atom count.

items.q: What particle determines an element's atomic number? (set 6)
items.explanation: Atomic number equals the number of protons.

items.q: Name the compound with formula H2SO4.
items.explanation: H2SO4 is commonly called sulfuric acid.
